Description: Images without alt attributes are invisible to screen readers
Do: Use descriptive alt text for all images
Don't: Don't use empty alt or skip alt entirely
Code Example Good: ''

Description: Text with insufficient contrast ratio against background
Do: Maintain 4.5:1 minimum contrast for normal text
Don't: Don't use light gray text on white background

Description: Interactive elements without visible focus indicators
Do: Add visible focus rings for keyboard navigation
Don't: Don't remove outline without alternative

Description: Interactive elements without accessible labels
Do: Add aria-label or aria-labelledby to interactive elements
Don't: Don't rely on visual-only labels

Description: Focus trapped in modal without escape mechanism
Do: Allow Escape key to close modals, provide focus trap
Don't: Don't trap focus without escape route

Description: No way to skip repetitive navigation
Do: Add skip navigation link as first focusable element
Don't: Don't force keyboard users to tab through entire nav

Description: Using color as the only way to convey information
Do: Use icons, patterns, or text alongside color
Don't: Don't rely solely on color to indicate status

Description: Form inputs without associated labels
Do: Use <label> with for/id or aria-label
Don't: Don't use placeholder as only label

Description: Interactive elements smaller than 44x44px
Do: Ensure minimum 44x44px touch targets
Don't: Don't make buttons/links smaller than 44px

Description: No viewport meta tag for responsive design
Do: Add <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1'>
Don't: Don't omit viewport meta tag

Description: Clickable elements without cursor: pointer
Do: Add cursor: pointer to all clickable/hoverable elements
Don't: Don't leave default cursor on interactive elements

Description: Hover effects that shift layout (scale transforms on cards)
Do: Use color/shadow transitions, avoid scale on containers
Don't: Don't use transform: scale on card containers

Description: Interactive elements without hover state indication
Do: Provide visual feedback on hover (color, shadow, border)
Don't: Don't leave interactive elements static on hover

Description: No visual indication when content is loading
Do: Show skeleton loaders, spinners, or progress indicators
Don't: Don't leave blank space during loading

Description: No visual feedback when errors occur
Do: Show clear error messages with recovery actions
Don't: Don't fail silently or show generic errors

Description: No design for when lists/containers have no content
Do: Show helpful empty state with illustration and action
Don't: Don't show blank/empty space

Description: Large unoptimized images slowing page load
Do: Use WebP format, lazy loading, responsive srcset
Don't: Don't use uncompressed PNG/JPEG for large images

Description: Repeated DOM reads/writes causing layout recalculations
Do: Batch DOM reads, then writes. Use requestAnimationFrame
Don't: Don't read layout properties after style changes
Code Example Good: const height = element.offsetHeight; requestAnimationFrame(() => { element.style.height = height + 'px'; })

Description: React components re-rendering on every state change
Do: Use React.memo, useMemo, useCallback for expensive operations
Don't: Don't create objects/functions in render without memoization

Description: Loading entire app bundle instead of route-based splitting
Do: Use React.lazy() + Suspense for route-level code splitting
Don't: Don't import everything statically

Description: Call-to-action text that doesn't match destination
Do: Use descriptive CTA text matching the action
Don't: Don't use vague CTAs like 'Click Here'

Description: Choice paralysis from too many options on screen
Do: Limit visible options, use progressive disclosure
Don't: Don't show all options at once
Code Example Bad: '.tabs { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; } /* too many */'

Description: No feedback after user actions
Do: Show success/error/loading states for all actions
Don't: Don't leave users wondering if action worked

Description: Inconsistent padding/margins throughout the interface
Do: Use a spacing scale (4px, 8px, 16px, 24px, 32px)
Don't: Don't use arbitrary spacing values

Description: Destructive actions without confirmation dialog
Do: Show confirmation dialog for delete, cancel, etc.
Don't: Don't delete without confirmation

Description: Content wider than viewport causing horizontal scroll
Do: Use max-width: 100%, overflow-x: hidden, flexible layouts
Don't: Don't use fixed widths larger than viewport

Description: Forms without proper input types, validation, or labels
Do: Use appropriate input types, labels, validation, autocomplete
Don't: Don't use text inputs for email/phone/number

Description: No tactile feedback on mobile interactions
Do: Add vibration feedback for important actions
Don't: Don't ignore mobile-specific interactions

Description: Overlapping elements due to unmanaged z-index
Do: Use systematic z-index scale, CSS variables for z-index
Don't: Don't use arbitrary z-index values

Description: Content jumping at breakpoint transitions
Do: Use fluid typography (clamp()), fluid spacing, smooth transitions
Don't: Don't have drastically different layouts at breakpoints

Description: Forms without client-side validation feedback
Do: Show real-time validation, inline errors, success states
Don't: Don't only validate on submit

Description: Form inputs without associated labels
Do: Use <label> with for/id or aria-label
Don't: Don't use placeholder as only label

Description: Cumulative Layout Shift from dynamic content loading
Do: Set dimensions for images/ads, use CSS aspect-ratio
Don't: Don't inject content above existing content without dimensions

Description: Loading all images eagerly including below-fold
Do: Add loading='lazy' to below-fold images
Don't: Don't load all images immediately

Description: Large CSS/JS blocking initial render
Do: Inline critical CSS, defer non-critical JS
Don't: Don't load all CSS/JS synchronously
Code Example Good: '<link rel="stylesheet" href="critical.css"> <link rel="stylesheet" href="full.css" media="print" onload="this.media=all">'

Description: Using divs instead of semantic HTML elements
Do: Use semantic HTML5 elements (article, section, nav, main, aside)
Don't: Don't use divs for everything

Description: Skipping heading levels (h1 to h3)
Do: Maintain logical heading hierarchy (h1 > h2 > h3)
Don't: Don't skip heading levels for styling

Description: External links opening in same tab without indication
Do: Add target='_blank' + rel='noopener' for external links
Don't: Don't open external links in same tab without warning
Code Example Good: 'External (opens in new tab)'

Description: No Content Security Policy headers
Do: Implement Content Security Policy to prevent XSS
Don't: Don't rely only on input sanitization

Description: Serving content over HTTP
Do: Use HTTPS for all content, redirect HTTP to HTTPS
Don't: Don't serve any content over plain HTTP
